detail: Automatically scraped from SB Acoustics website (scraped 2026-06-24). T/S parameters have not been verified by a human against the datasheet.
corrections: Corrected parser bug: HTML entity – (en-dash) was not decoded before parse_number, causing "8211" to be matched instead of actual Q values (Qts/Qes/Qms were all 8211, Le was 8.211H). Fix: html.unescape() applied to li text before parsing. Values now confirmed against SB26STWGC-4 datasheet PDF
